title: glaucocochlearia glastifolia
intro: Glaucocochlearia glastifolia, also known as hairy globe carrot, is a type of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Glaucocochlearia glastifolia is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function.
